steps.title: Write walking distance
steps.content:
Distance equals rate times time. Walking at $4$ miles per hour for $w$ hours gives
$$4w$$

steps.title: Write running distance
steps.content:
Running at $7$ miles per hour for $r$ hours gives
$$7r$$

steps.title: Set the total distance
steps.content:
The combined total distance is $18$ miles, so
$$4w+7r=18$$
The answer is A.
